title: RobinhoodMcpCapabilityManifest
description: Canonical machine-readable manifest of the Robinhood Trading MCP capability surface, as consumed by HISS skills, the coil runtime, and drift tooling. ONE source of truth: skills declare capability-family ids (see capabilityFamilies), never per-skill tool lists. Every UNKNOWN is a runtime FAIL-CLOSED default: not available, not permitted, must be reconciled out of band. Upgrading an UNKNOWN requires a dated primary-source citation OR an authorised-session schema capture committed to docs/mcp/evidence/. A secondary writeup never suffices. This manifest is derived from and must stay drift-consistent with docs/mcp/capability-matrix.json (the shipped, gate-tested matrix).

manifestVersion.description: Semantic-ish version of this manifest artifact (bump on any capability change).

derivedFrom.description: Provenance: the shipped matrix + evidence this manifest is a typed projection of. This manifest never introduces a capability the matrix has not verified.

verifiedAt.description: ISO date of the most recent verification (probe + article re-fetch).

publicImpact.description: This manifest itself is INTERNAL; the skills that read it are PUBLIC_SKILL_SURFACE. Classification is required per mission rule.

failClosedRule.description: Verbatim statement of the fail-closed rule the runtime imports.

scopesSupported.description: OAuth scopes advertised. VERIFIED: only 'internal' — no read-vs-trade separation.

introspectable.description: Whether tools/list is answerable without a bearer token. VERIFIED false (401).

globalSemantics.description: Cross-tool semantics. Each carries a status; UNKNOWN => fail-closed default.

capabilityFamilies.description: The §28.5 families a skill may declare in its frontmatter. Closed set — a skill referencing a family id not in this list fails validation.

capabilities.description: The verified tool surface, one RobinhoodMcpCapability per MCP tool.

gatedTools.description: The §28.5 'do not assume exists' list. A skill may not claim any of these un-gated. Mix of SCHEMA-UNKNOWN (exists, params auth-walled) and VERIFIED-ABSENT (does not exist).

unknownCount.description: Frozen count of C1 UNKNOWN semantics. The runtime pins this; drift is a release-blocking event.

failClosedDefault.description: What the runtime assumes when status is UNKNOWN or ABSENT.

readOnly.description: True if every member tool is read/simulate class (no state-write, no order-write).

consumes.description: The tool names this family resolves to. A tool may appear in more than one family.

id.description: Stable id, form tool.<name>. Matches the shipped matrix row id.

group.description: Robinhood's own article section heading (source grouping).

families.description: The capability-family ids skills consume this tool through.

riskClass.description: read: no side effect. simulate: review_* pre-trade validation, no binding. state-write: mutates brokerage-side watchlist/scan state (non-capital). order-write: capital-moving place/cancel.

accountScoped.description: all-accounts-read: read spans EVERY Robinhood account (VERIFIED asymmetry). agentic-account-write: write confined to the Agentic account. market-global: not account-scoped. none: n/a.

agenticAccountRequired.description: True only for order-write tools — placement is confined to the Agentic account.

currentlyDocumented.description: Named + described in the official article (VERIFIED). All 50 are true.

schemaDiscovered.description: Whether the input/output schema has been captured from an authorised session. Currently false for all 50 (auth-walled). False => callers MUST discover shape at session time and validate before every call.

supportedAssetClasses.description: Asset classes this tool operates on. Trading is long equities + options only (VERIFIED); crypto is watch-only.

supportedOrderTypes.description: For order/simulate tools only. UNKNOWN for all — no order type is named in any official source; discover per session.

supportedTif.description: Time-in-force values. UNKNOWN for all — undocumented; discover per session.

payloadCap.description: Per-call payload cap where officially stated (e.g. '20 symbols'), else UNKNOWN. NOT a request-rate limit.

requestRate.description: Request-rate limit. UNKNOWN for all tools — undisclosed; runtime imposes conservative self-budgets + 429 backoff.

retrySafe.description: 'yes' for reads; 'NO' for order-write (no client-order-id documented).

idempotency.description: Server idempotency guarantee. UNKNOWN/absent for order-write — assume none.

onAmbiguousFailure.description: Mandated behaviour on an ambiguous transport failure. For order-write: reconciliation_required via C6 order-list diff, coil halts, NEVER blind retry.

livePolicy.description: Runtime posture: who may call this tool and when. HISS-hosted services never call any of them; only the user's own agent session.

mustBeGated.description: schema-unknown: exists but params auth-walled, skill must schema-discover. verified-absent: relates to a capability that does NOT exist and must never be claimed. no: standard read usable at name level.

ref.description: Tool name or capability phrase (e.g. 'quote WebSocket', 'bulk cancel-all').

skillRule.description: What a skill is permitted to say — the frontmatter/copy rule the product lane checks against.
